mapper.select: SELECT event_name AS eventName, COALESCE(event_hour, event_time / 60) AS eventHour, COALESCE(event_min, event_time % 60) AS eventMinute FROM recovery_intraoperative_event WHERE treatment_information_id = #{treatmentInformationId} ORDER BY COALESCE(event_hour, event_time / 60), COALESCE(event_min, event_time % 60)

SELECT event_name AS eventName, COALESCE(event_hour, event_time / 60) AS eventHour, COALESCE(event_min, event_time % 60) AS eventMinute FROM recovery_complication_event WHERE treatment_information_id = #{treatmentInformationId} ORDER BY COALESCE(event_hour, event_time / 60), COALESCE(event_min, event_time % 60)

SELECT atomization_inhalation AS atomizationInhalation, oral_care AS oralCare, arteriovenous_catheter_care AS arteriovenousCatheterCare, st_segment_analysis AS stSegmentAnalysis, heart_rate_variability_analysis AS heartRateVariabilityAnalysis, blood_fluid_warming_treatment AS bloodFluidWarmingTreatment, auscultate_breath_sounds AS auscultateBreathSounds, limb_compression_therapy AS limbCompressionTherapy, mask_oxygen_inhalation AS maskOxygenInhalation, oropharyngeal_nasopharyngeal_ventilation AS oropharyngealNasopharyngealVentilation, leave_room_with_tube AS leaveRoomWithTube FROM recovery_monitoring_event WHERE treatment_information_id = #{treatmentInformationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recovery_monitoring_event ( treatment_information_id, atomization_inhalation, oral_care, arteriovenous_catheter_care, st_segment_analysis, heart_rate_variability_analysis, blood_fluid_warming_treatment, auscultate_breath_sounds, limb_compression_therapy, mask_oxygen_inhalation, oropharyngeal_nasopharyngeal_ventilation, leave_room_with_tube ) VALUES ( #{treatmentInformationId}, #{atomizationInhalation}, #{oralCare}, #{arteriovenousCatheterCare}, #{stSegmentAnalysis}, #{heartRateVariabilityAnalysis}, #{bloodFluidWarmingTreatment}, #{auscultateBreathSounds}, #{limbCompressionTherapy}, #{maskOxygenInhalation}, #{oropharyngealNasopharyngealVentilation}, #{leaveRoomWithTube} )
INSERT INTO recovery_intraoperative_event ( treatment_information_id, event_name, event_hour, event_min ) VALUES ( #{treatmentInformationId}, #{eventName}, #{eventHour}, #{eventMinute} )
INSERT INTO recovery_complication_event ( treatment_information_id, event_name, event_hour, event_min ) VALUES ( #{treatmentInformationId}, #{eventName}, #{eventHour}, #{eventMinute} )
